title: Cloud Reliability Runbook Builder
description: Create automated reliability runbooks and alert-driven remediation workflows.
learning_objectives:
Design runbook templates
Automate remediation steps
Track incident outcomes
task_checklist:
Define reliability SLOs
Create runbook scripts
Wire alerts to actions
Document postmortem template

title: Cloud Architecture Portfolio
description: Build a deployable cloud reference architecture with cost and security considerations.
learning_objectives:
Model cloud architecture components
Implement infrastructure as code
Validate architecture tradeoffs
resources:
AWS Architecture Center | https://aws.amazon.com/architecture/
Terraform Docs | https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/docs
task_checklist:
Create architecture diagram
Provision core services
Add monitoring and logs
Publish architecture notes

title: Executive BI Storyboard

Create clear KPI visuals
Write insight-driven summaries

title: Monolith to Microservices Blueprint

Assess monolith boundaries
Design service contracts
Build migration prototype

Microservices Patterns | https://microservices.io/
Docker Docs | https://docs.docker.com/

Map domain modules
Split one service increment
Add API gateway route
Validate end-to-end flow

title: Cross-Platform Travel Planner App

Implement itinerary features
Add offline sync strategy
Integrate map navigation

Flutter Docs | https://docs.flutter.dev/
Firebase Docs | https://firebase.google.com/docs

Create app navigation flow
Build itinerary CRUD
Add offline caching
Integrate maps and location

title: Scalable API Domain Modeling

Implement ingestion service
Store and query telemetry
